tool_args.raw_text: Bx6 Select Bus Service Project Update | Manhattan Community Board 9 Transportation Committee | May 5, 2022

payload.title: Bx6 Select Bus Service Project Update

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.entity_name: New York City Department of Transportation
New York City Department of Design and Construction

payload.description: Proposed capital improvements for Bx6 Select Bus Service corridor including pedestrian islands, curb extensions, bus pads, and bus bulbs at 155th St & Broadway, 155th St & Amsterdam Av, and 155th St & Edgecombe Av
Bx6 Select Bus Service launched
Implemented bus lanes as part of Bx6 SBS launch
Implemented off-board fare machines as part of Bx6 SBS launch
Implemented boarding islands as part of Bx6 SBS launch
161st Street Bus Only Tunnel (eastbound) as part of Bx6 SBS launch
Proposed pedestrian islands as capital improvement
Proposed curb extensions as capital improvement
Proposed bus pads as capital improvement
Proposed bus bulbs as capital improvement

payload.treatment_kind: curb extension and painted pedestrian space
payload.description: Proposed: build out painted ped space, add curb extension at 155th St & Broadway
Proposed: add curb extensions and add bus bulbs at 155th St & Amsterdam Av

payload.treatment_kind: painted pedestrian space and bicycle movements
payload.description: Proposed: build out painted ped space, formalize bicycle movements at 155th St & Edgecombe Av
Eastbound Bx6 Local bus travel time (October 2016) 7 AM - 10 AM

payload.claim_text: After launch of SBS, buses moved 11% to 16% faster end-to-end.
payload.subject: Bx6 SBS bus speeds

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.claim_text: Bus speeds spiked at height of pandemic but are trending back to pre-pandemic levels.
payload.subject: Bx6 SBS peak period bus speeds

payload.claim_text: Bus reliability has improved with fewer buses arriving late and less bus 'bunching'.
payload.subject: Bx6 SBS bus reliability

payload.claim_text: Bus ridership in both the Bronx and along the Bx6 route has been decreasing. However, ridership along the Bx6 corridor is declining at a slower rate than the borough average.
payload.subject: Bx6 bus ridership

payload.description: Finalize Design for Bx6 SBS capital improvements
Procurement for Bx6 SBS capital improvements
Construction Start for Bx6 SBS capital improvements
Presentations to additional community boards: Manhattan CB 12 (5/2), Manhattan CB 9 (5/5), Manhattan CB 10 (5/10), Bronx CB 2 (5/11), Bronx CB 4 (5/12), Bronx CB 3 (5/16)
